# HttpRequestStepUpsertDtoControlValues

Control values for the HTTP Request step.


## Supported Types

### `Components\HttpRequestControlDto`

```php
/**
* @var \novu\Models\Components\HttpRequestControlDto
*/
Components\HttpRequestControlDto $value = /* values here */
```

### `array`

```php
/**
* @var array<string, mixed>
*/
array $value = /* values here */
```
